name: Bug report
about: Something in the template is broken or behaves incorrectly

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What's broken? Be specific — "init.sh fails" is less useful than "init.sh crashes on line 134 when Tailscale IP is skipped."

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead? Include the full error output if there is one.

```
paste error output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS / distro | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Arch Linux |
| GPU | e.g. RTX 4090, no GPU |
| Inference server | e.g. LM Studio 0.3.x, Ollama, none |
| OpenClaw version | e.g. 0.9.2 (run `openclaw --version`) |
| Governor template commit | e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD` |
| Shell | e.g. bash 5.2, zsh 5.9 |

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant — config redactions, log excerpts, workarounds you've already tried.
